data.title: LHM Guidance Revision - Increase FY2026 Production Range
data.description: In Perth, Australia on April 16, 2026, Paladin Energy Ltd (ASX:PDN, TSX:PDN, OTCQX:PALAF) released an operations and guidance update for the Langer Heinrich Mine (LHM) ahead of its upcoming March 2026 Quarterly Report, set for publication on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Kailera Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: Today, Kailera Therapeutics, Inc. revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The company, listed on Nasdaq as KLRA, made this announcement.

data.title: FinanceAsia names SM companies among Asia's Best Companies for 2026
data.description: In the recent Asia's Best Companies 2026 poll by Hong Kong-based publication FinanceAsia, four SM companies from Pasay City, Philippines were acknowledged. The recognition was based on evaluations from institutional investors and financial analysts throughout the region. This achievement showcases the companies' strong standing in the industry and emphasizes their notable performance in the eyes of experts.

data.title: BTC's funding rate negative despite price over $75K. Traders concerned as BTC futures unaffected.
data.description: Despite Bitcoin's recent surge above $75,000, the futures funding rate has continued to be negative. This has raised concerns among traders about the sustainability of the current price levels. It suggests that a majority of traders are betting against Bitcoin in the futures market despite its price rally. This negative funding rate could indicate potential bearish sentiment or a lack of confidence in the current bullish trend. It is essential for traders to closely monitor this indicator to assess the market's sentiment and make informed decisions regarding their positions.
